patch.value: Tracks GitHub issue #243: add pm comments edit/delete support for obsolete orchestration-note cleanup.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Design decisions for GH-243 (pm comments edit/delete): (1) 1-based index matching list order. (2) Flags: --delete <index> and --edit <index>; replacement text from positional [text]/--add/--stdin/--file. (3) New ops comment_edit, comment_delete; allowlisted in bypassesAssigneeConflict under --allow-audit-comment. (4) Edit preserves original created_at+author, sets edited_at=nowIso(). (5) Extend runAnnotationCommand mode union with edit/delete; surface only on comments command.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Integration (lead): wired shared surfaces the sub-agent flagged — register-mutation comments command (--edit/--delete via new parsePositiveIntOption argParser), MCP pm_comments (isListing guard + description + param tables), completion bash/zsh, COMMENTS_FLAG_CONTRACTS + contracts golden, docs/COMMANDS.md. Refactored resolveCommentInput to reuse resolveCommentTextSource (removed duplication). Added full edit/delete + resolveAnnotationIndex + op-fallback + CLI-registration tests for 100% coverage.

patch.value: Extended annotation-command with edit/delete modes + comment_edit/comment_delete ops; surfaced on comments command, MCP, completion, contracts, docs.
Agents can fix/remove obsolete comments via CLI/MCP.
comments supported only list/add; no edit or delete.
Added: pm comments --edit/--delete lifecycle commands for obsolete-note cleanup.
